title: How a man of God becomes worth marrying
caption:
Most men are chasing the girl. God wants you to chase something else first.

The man who makes marriage his mission will reek of it — she can feel the desperation even when he dresses it up as love. But the man walking with God, building the life, trusting the timing? He becomes someone she'd actually want to step toward.

Get the order right. Chase God first. Do the work in the meantime. Pray for her with open hands, not a clenched fist. And trust that what God promises in Proverbs 18:22 — "he who finds a wife finds a good thing" — is a find, not a hunt.

Save this for the brother who's trying to rush it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #relationships #christianlove #discipleship #scripture #vision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
